option.name: originalMessage
option.value: move Bayesian Smoothing to gpu --Du Wang

option.name: rewordedMessage
option.value: move Bayesian Smoothing to gpu --Du Wang

task.summary: A database suitable for user-collaborative filtering knn. -- Du Wang
A database suitable for user-collaborative filtering knn. -- Du Wang
User knn, database partitioning script, test script, a huge dataset. --Du Wang
It's purely AI-oriented programming, with a lot of code that I can't understand. I need some time to sort it out and understand it before deciding whether to merge it into main. --Du Wang
move Bayesian Smoothing to gpu --Du Wang
move Bayesian Smoothing to gpu --Du Wang
